name: Amber Glass Table Lamp Brown - Threshold™
description:
Update your table lamp collection with the Amber Glass Table Lamp from Threshold™. This table lamp features a white drum-shaped shade and an amber-hue glass base with a translucent design for an appealing look. This table lamp has a rotary turn knob with a one-way light setting for quick on and off.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
